Title.description: Short title for the recurring historical character set.

Summary.description: Brief summary of how the historical character set supports the documentary.

HistoricalCharacters.description: Recurring historical characters whose look should stay consistent across the documentary.

CharacterSheetPrompt.description: Prompt for a production-style historical character model sheet that combines turnaround views and facial expression panels in one reference image.

PortraitPrompt.description: Prompt for a canonical portrait of the historical character that matches the character sheet.
